product_overview: DromeFlow is a comprehensive management and analytics application built with React, TypeScript, and Supabase. It centralizes multi-unit business operations including user authentication, unit configuration, CRM, appointments, financial tracking, access control, data ingestion, and post-sales follow-up with realtime synchronization and advanced dashboards.
core_goals: Enable secure, role-based access control across multiple business units.
Provide comprehensive CRUD management for units including keys, modules, and subscription plans.
Facilitate CRM and client management with interaction records.
Deliver scheduling and management of service appointments.
Offer financial dashboards with key performance metrics and realtime updates.
Implement a scalable, modular system with dynamic modules and drag & drop ordering.
Ensure data integrity with intelligent upload processing of XLSX spreadsheets.
Support advanced post-sales management with bidirectional automatic synchronization between data records and post-sales.
Maintain detailed logs of user activity and external webhooks for auditing and analytics.
Provide multi-unit data aggregation and seamless navigation experience based on user permissions.
key_features: Authentication & Authorization with Role-Based Access Control: Supports super_admin, admin, and user roles with unit-specific permissions.
Unit Management: Full CRUD operations on units, including configuration of unique keys, modules, and subscription plans with admin-only views for sensitive keys.
Dynamic Module System: Modules are dynamically managed with iconography, ordering via drag and drop, and profile-based access filtering.
CRM & Client Management: Manages clients and tracks their interaction records with advanced metrics on recurrents and churn.
Appointment Scheduling: Enables creation, viewing, and management of service appointments integrated with realtime updates.
Financial Dashboard & Metrics: Displays detailed financial KPIs such as total revenue, average ticket, repasses, and margin metrics, with monthly trend visualizations and submetric drill-downs.
Realtime Synchronization: Full realtime features across post-sales, appointments, and dashboard modules avoid UI hanging and duplicate reloads.
Upload & Processing Pipeline: Processes Excel uploads with multi-professional expansion, automatic wait-status logic, and efficient batching for data integrity and synchronization.
Post-Sales Management with Bidirectional Sync: Automatically creates post-sales entries from processed data and syncs statuses back, featuring a comprehensive scheduling and status workflow.
Activity & Workflow Logging: Centralized logging system captures module accesses and external webhook (N8N) workflows with detailed metadata and indexing for performance.
Unit Keys Administration: Allows super_admin to add, rename, deactivate, and delete custom configuration columns per unit with safety validations and real-time updates.
User & Access Management: Admin interface to assign and restrict modules per unit and user, reflecting a hierarchical permission model.
Multi-Unit Views & Aggregations: Supports viewing aggregated data across multiple units (ALL) with correct data merging and filtering.
Commercial Module with Kanban: Drag & drop UI for managing sales opportunities, with optimistic updates and trigger-based synchronization with clients.
Edge Case & Security Best Practices: Strict RLS policies, sanitized inputs for dynamic columns, confirmation modals for destructive actions, and separation of storage from CDN.
user_flow_summary: User logs in via custom authentication consulting 'profiles' table; session and roles are stored in local storage.
Upon login, system fetches user's units and modules based on assigned roles and permissions hierarchy.
Users navigate via sidebar filtered dynamically by module availability and user role; first active module loads automatically.
Admin users manage units in a dedicated page: editing unit details, keys, modules, and subscription plans.
Super Admins access advanced pages including the Unit Keys administration to add or modify configuration columns.
Users upload XLSX spreadsheets; system processes data with multi-professional expansion, status automation, and cleans obsolete records.
Post-sales records are automatically created from new processed data entries and statuses synchronize bidirectionally.
Users schedule appointments and manage them with realtime updates reflected instantly across all viewers.
Activity and webhook logs capture all module accesses and external automation events for auditing.
Users can assign modules to users and units via dedicated modals, with UI reflecting hierarchical access.
All data and metrics support multi-unit aggregated views respecting filtering rules and data integrity.
Users interact with kanban boards for commercial opportunities managing drag-and-drop and state persistence.
validation_criteria: Role-based access enforced on UI and API with RLS policies as per hierarchy (super_admin, admin, user).
Unit keys can only be manipulated by super_admin roles; validations prevent invalid or duplicate column names.
Realtime subscriptions update UI without requiring manual data reload; loading spinner issues resolved by removing redundant reload calls.
Upload pipeline processes XLSX data correctly including multi-professional expansions, status logic, and batch RPC calls without duplicates.
Bidirectional synchronization between processed_data and pos_vendas tables maintains data consistency with triggers.
Dashboards and client metrics match expected definitions for recurring and churn clients using discrete month queries matching backend logic.
Kanban board drag-and-drop updates persist immediately and reflect in related client data via triggers.
Logs capture all actions with necessary metadata; webhook log table optimally indexed and secure.
All modals and forms autosave and display appropriate feedback states (saving, saved, error).
Dynamic module lists and sidebar correctly filter modules by is_active and allowed profiles following the permission model.
Unit and user module assignments correctly update database tables with appropriate delete/insert pattern and logging.
Security validations for SQL injection and data integrity enforced in all RPC calls and service layers.
Frontend layouts and interactions follow TailwindCSS design guidelines and accessibility best practices.
System builds and deploys successfully in Node v18+ and NPM 9+ environment as documented.
